mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student ( name, phone, age, gender, address_id, college_id, role_id, major_id ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{phone}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{addressId}, #{collegeId}, #{roleId}, #{majorId} )
mapper.select: SELECT s.student_id,s.name, s.phone, s.age, s.gender,s.address_id, s.college_id, s.role_id, s.major_id,a.province, a.city, a.district, a.detail,c.college_name, r.role_name, m.major_name FROM student AS s LEFT JOIN address AS a ON s.address_id = a.address_id LEFT JOIN college AS c ON s.college_id = c.college_id LEFT JOIN role AS r ON s.role_id = r.role_id LEFT JOIN major AS m ON s.major_id = m.major_id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId};

SELECT -- 补全 student 表的所有核心字段 s.student_id, s.`name`, s.phone, s.age, s.gender, s.address_id, -- 补缺失 s.college_id, -- 补缺失 s.role_id, -- 补缺失 s.major_id, -- 补缺失 -- 关联表字段（保留原有，可选加主键） a.address_id, -- 可选：地址表主键 a.province, a.city, a.district, a.detail, c.college_id, -- 可选：学院表主键 c.college_name, r.role_id, -- 可选：角色表主键 r.role_name, m.major_id, -- 可选：专业表主键 m.major_name FROM student AS s LEFT JOIN address AS a ON s.address_id = a.address_id LEFT JOIN college AS c on s.college_id = c.college_id LEFT JOIN role AS r ON s.role_id = r.role_id LEFT JOIN major AS m on s.major_id = m.major_id;
